prompt: Create a serene surreal digital painting of a tranquil creative workspace merging into a vast reflective lake at sunset. Use a wide 16:9 cinematic composition with a dark tabletop in the foreground seamlessly meeting calm water and distant horizon. In the exact center background, place a glowing low sun casting a bright golden S-shaped path of light across the water toward the viewer. On the right horizon, add a dramatic jagged snow-capped mountain range with one dominant sharp peak, lightly wrapped in low mist. In the upper left sky, include exactly 2 celestial details: a thin crescent moon and one tiny star. In the upper right sky, include exactly 6 small flying bird silhouettes arranged diagonally upward. Foreground objects: on the left, place a balanced stack of exactly 5 smooth black zen stones beside an artist paint palette with exactly 5 visible paint wells and a single paintbrush lying diagonally; on the right, place an open blank notebook with a pen resting across it and a single dark coffee cup with handle. Mood should be peaceful, meditative, and dreamlike, with warm orange-gold light near the horizon fading into cool blue-gray shadows above and below. Use soft atmospheric haze, realistic reflections, subtle painterly texture, high detail, no people, no visible text, no watermark. The overall theme is calm creative solitude, with the main color palette emphasizing warm amber sunset and cool charcoal blue.
